prompt:
CI is failing on PR #1 due to zizmor findings. Fix ALL zizmor issues across all workflow files.

## Current zizmor findings (32 total, 4 categories):

### 1. unpinned-uses (error) — 11 instances
All action references must use full 40-char SHA pins, not @v4 or @main tags.
Look up the correct SHAs for:
- actions/checkout@v4 → pin to SHA
- DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@main → pin to SHA (use v16: e50d5f73bfe71c2dd0aa4218de8f4afa59f8f81d)
- cachix/install-nix-action → pin to SHA (use v30: 08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72)
- Any other unpinned actions

### 2. excessive-permissions (warning) — 10 instances
Every job needs an explicit permissions block. Add minimal permissions:
- Most jobs only need: contents: read
- Jobs that comment on PRs also need: pull-requests: write
- Or set top-level permissions on the workflow

### 3. artipacked (warning) — 7 instances
The actions/checkout step persists credentials by default. Add 'persist-credentials: false' to all checkout steps.

### 4. template-injection (error) — 4 instances
Using ${{ github.event.client_payload.* }} directly in run: steps is injectable. Store these in env: variables first, then reference via $ENV_VAR in the shell.

For example, change:
  run: echo ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
To:
  env:
    PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
  run: echo $PR_NUMBER

## Files to fix
- .github/workflows/ci.yml
- .github/workflows/preview.yml
- .github/workflows/staging.yml
- .github/workflows/prod.yml

## Verification
After fixing, run: nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits
This must exit 0 (or only have informational/low findings, not warnings or errors).

## Constraints
- Pin ALL action SHAs with full 40-char hashes
- Do not change any non-workflow files unless necessary
- Run the full CI locally if possible: nix flake check, cue vet, nix build
